name: G.I Tennis Center
description: G.I Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Grand Island, NE. There are 6 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Grand Island Tennis Center
description: Grand Island Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Grand Island, NE. There are 6 indoor courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Fee required — $6 to play each session. You can also buy a punch card for $55 for 10 plays.

name: Grand Island YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Grand Island YMCA in Grand Island, NE! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Pier Park
description: Come play pickleball at Pier Park in Grand Island, NE! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Sothman Park
description: Sothman Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Grand Island, NE. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Stolley Park
description: Come play pickleball at Stolley Park in Grand Island, NE! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Veterans complex
description: Veterans complex is a place to play pickleball in Grand Island, NE. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.
